recap: Colombia secured their place in the World Cup's round of 16 with a 1-0 victory over Ghana, with Jhon Arias capitalizing on Luis Suárez's cross just 14 minutes in after Córdoba's injury forced the early substitution. Ghana created little of substance in response, with Antoine Semenyo's attacking forays yielding nothing as Lawrence Ati Zigi kept Colombia at bay with a crucial save on Johan Mojica's header, while an offside flag denied Luis Díaz a second goal that would have settled the contest. Colombia's control never wavered, and Ghana failed to trouble goalkeeper Camilo Vargas throughout the second half as the South Americans booked a meeting with Switzerland in Vancouver.
